name: shadow-blade-rogue
description: 影刃花海：无双割草肉鸽 Canvas 小游戏，含 GitHub Pages 与抖音小游戏工程。

scripts.build:site: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html styles.css .nojekyll dist/ && cp -R src dist/src && mkdir -p dist/assets/generated dist/assets/sprites && cp assets/generated/title-key-art.jpg dist/assets/generated/ && cp assets/sprites/*.png dist/assets/sprites/
scripts.check: node --check src/blade-survivor.js && node --check src/web.js && node --check douyin-minigame/game.js && node /Users/orange/.codex/skills/publish-douyin-minigame/scripts/check_minigame_project.mjs douyin-minigame
